contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: dao_protocol PR1b: deployed the FastAPI service to production + routed /dao-protocol/ via edgar nginx
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/190
  
  Details:
  PR1b (live deploy) of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction. Deployed the FastAPI service on the production Edgar app box (seni_ror_new:8010) under systemd (truesight-dao-protocol, venv at /home/ubuntu/dao_protocol, installed the [server] extra). Added a /dao-protocol/ location to the live edgar nginx and verified end to end: https://edgar.truesight.me/dao-protocol/healthz returns 200 JSON. Investigation corrected a wrong topology assumption in the docs: edgar.truesight.me resolves via DNS directly to seni_ror_new and is served by that box's own local nginx (/etc/nginx/sites-available/edgar.conf), NOT by the krake_ng shared proxy whose edgar block is stale/inert. Reverted the misdirected krake_ng edits back to pristine, removed an unneeded security-group rule (the proxy hop is localhost), and updated the plan, backlog, and resume tracker so the next session edits the correct box. RESUME at PR2 (/proxy/gas).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
